programme.desc: A profile of the London-born actress, who was nominated for an Academy Award for Hamlet and won the Golden Globe for Best Actress for Guys and Dolls.

programme.title: The Two Escobars

programme.title: Bobby Robson: More Than a Manager
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the career of the much-loved former England, Barcelona and Newcastle United manager.
